creator: jrhett@netconsonance.com
text:
Quagga 0.99.10 fixes a lot of bugs.

Fix: Attached is a patch which compiles properly for 0.99.10 *except* if you enable the MD5 checksum patches, as these have all changed.

It would appear that all files named "patch-cvs-*" are included/obsoleted by this version and can be removed.

Patch attached with submission follows:
